summary: Completed frontend testing of EventForm redesign and Ukrainian language fixes (ви→ти). All 14 features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Event form (/event/new) → manual form shows event type dropdown same width as title input with bg-[#E8E5DF] background color
2. Event form: date field shows text like '23 березень' not native date picker
3. Event form: clicking date opens inline calendar popup (not dialog)
4. Event form: calendar popup shows month with navigation arrows
5. Event form: 'регулярна' shows 7 weekday buttons horizontal in one row (пн вт ср чт пт сб нд)
6. Event form: time inputs show '12:00' and '14:30' by default as text inputs
7. Event form: clicking time input opens dropdown with 30-min intervals (08:00, 08:30, etc.)
8. Event form: time inputs allow manual text entry
9. Event form: button 'створити подію' in lowercase
10. Event form: has bottom padding (h-24 div after create button)
11. Event form: selecting 'повтор' opens past events dialog with title 'обери подію для повтору' (not оберіть)
12. Event form: past events dialog has space-y-3 and p-4 per item (bigger spacing)
13. No 'ви' forms remaining: all 'оберіть'→'обери', 'напишіть'→'напиши', 'спробуйте'→'спробуй', 'перевірте'→'перевір' verified via grep
14. AI parsing page shows lowercase text: 'розумне створення', 'розпізнати', 'спробувати ще раз'
15. Main dashboard renders correctly with 4 columns (ПОДІЇ, SMM, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ, МАРКЕТИНГ)
critical_code_review_comments: EventForm correctly implements grid cols-[1fr_1fr] for title and event type dropdown
Event type select has bg-[#E8E5DF] class for different background color
Date field shows 'XX місяць' format using UK_MONTHS_NOMINATIVE array
Inline calendar uses calendar-minimal class, not Dialog wrapper
Weekdays use flex gap-1.5 for horizontal layout with all 7 days
Time inputs use text type with custom dropdown, not native time picker
TIME_OPTIONS array generates 30-min intervals from 08:00 to 23:30
Past events dialog has space-y-3 container and p-4 per button item
All 'ви' forms (оберіть, напишіть, спробуйте, перевірте) changed to 'ти' forms (обери, напиши, спробуй, перевір)
h-24 div provides bottom padding after create button
context_for_next_testing_agent: EventForm redesign complete: 1) Event type dropdown has bg-[#E8E5DF] and same width as title. 2) Date shows 'XX місяць' format with inline calendar popup. 3) Weekdays horizontal in flex row. 4) Time uses text input + custom dropdown with 30-min intervals. 5) All 'ви' forms changed to 'ти'. 6) Bottom padding h-24. External URL: https://task-hub-890.preview.emergentagent.com. Event form at /event/new, click 'заповнити вручну' to see manual form.
